title: acmispon prostratus
intro: Acmispon prostratus, also known as the creeping lupine or prostrate lupine, is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Acmispon prostratus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety, and act as an antioxidant. Acmispon prostratus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
